description:
Attempts to move given waypoint to a random position inside a circle with the given center and radius. 
The waypoint will be placed similar to {{hl|"NONE"}} attribute in [[setVehiclePosition]], even if the radius is 0, which means it could still be off center. In order to force waypoint to the exact position, similar to {{hl|"CAN_COLLIDE"}} attribute, use a negative radius (see {{Link|#Example 2}}).
examples:
Exact placement using a negative ''radius'' and [[Position#PositionASL|PositionASL]]:
<sqf>_wp setWaypointPosition [getPosASL player, -1];</sqf>
name: setWaypointPosition

Item.desc: random placement radius in meters. Set it to -1 and convert center to [[Position#PositionASL|PositionASL]] for the exact center placement
Item.name: radius
